_note: Conqueror Award box contents for gift_group 1106 (S2864 final rank tier). Extracted from game `reward` table; icons in assets/cq-award-icons/contents/.

supreme.name: Seal Stone Badge
supreme.desc: It is used to trade items in the Contribution Tab within the Seal Stone Store and it will be deleted when the event ends.

supreme.name: Fluffynx (Limited)
supreme.desc: It grants a random Legendary-rarity Fluffynx. Its main stat is always March Size, with base stats affecting all troop types. A max-star Fluffynx increases the march size by +3. It can use any Enigma Beast for star upgrades and bypasses species restrictions in the Enigma Field.

supreme.name: Energy Circle (Permanent)
supreme.desc: Use it to get the base skin: Energy Circle (Permanent)

supreme.name: Chaos Stone
supreme.desc: Use it to upgrade Energy Circle to Gate of Passage, and then to Spacetime Tunnel

supreme.name: Stabilizer
supreme.desc: Use it to lock 1 "Random Attribute" for the refinement.

supreme.name: Legendary Beast Chest
supreme.desc: Grants a random Legendary Enigma Beast from the following: Lumideer, Hoveray, Galeagle, or Grizzclaw.

supreme.name: Top-tier Catalyst
supreme.desc: A general-purpose material, it guarantees the robust basic performance of Titan Gear.

supreme.name: Orange Universal Shard
supreme.desc: Redeem this shard for shards of 'SSR' rarity heroes you've recruited.

supreme.name: Expert HT Chip Chest
supreme.desc: Use it to get an HT Chip for a random slot (rarity ranges from "Epic" to "Legendary"), or a Heavy Trooper Module.

supreme.name: Titan Gear Random Material Chest
supreme.desc: Open it to get ONE of the following: Smelt Goldgleam x5, Liquid Alloy x5, Honeycomb Core x5, Gel Layer x5, or Micro Electronics x5.
